title: Blended status colours for RAG (e.g. Red/Amber, Amber/Green)
excerpt:
In our projects we report RAG status as: 
Green 
Amber/Green 
Amber 
Amber/Red 
Red 
It would be a great feature to be able to have blended colours to show these different status.

posts.author: KevinHolmes (KevinH)
posts.cookedHtml:
In our projects we report RAG status as:

Amber/Red
